title: Digital PCR assay design
author: Vandesompele, Jo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Lecture on "Digital PCR assay design" as part of the "Digital PCR specialist course" on 18-20 May 2026 (Ghent, Belgium), organized by DIGPCR (https://digpcr.ugent.be/). Hands-on session using primer3, BiSearch, DimerDetective, mfold, gnomAD, In-Silico PCR, SBT model, and NEBcutter.
steps_raw: Lecture on "Digital PCR assay design" as part of the "Digital PCR specialist course" on 18-20 May 2026 (Ghent, Belgium), organized by DIGPCR (https://digpcr.ugent.be/). Hands-on session using primer3, BiSearch, DimerDetective, mfold, gnomAD, In-Silico PCR, SBT model, and NEBcutter.
